final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing hand-drawn infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships among seven AI concepts, intended for educational sharing on Xiaohongshu or social media.

Style/medium: hand-drawn illustration infographic, sketchnote / visual-note aesthetic with doodle icons and connector arrows
Composition: multi-panel layout with each concept in its own labeled node, relationship arrows and connectors linking nodes, legend or mini-diagram showing how concepts interact, balanced visual hierarchy across the canvas
Subject: seven concept nodes —
  1. AI — definition panel with icon
  2. MCP (Model Context Protocol) — definition panel with icon
  3. AI Agent — definition panel with icon
  4. OpenClaw — definition panel with icon
  5. AI Skill — definition panel with icon
  6. 蒸馏 (Distillation) — definition panel with icon
  7. CLI (Command Line Interface) — definition panel with icon
  Relationship connectors showing how concepts relate: e.g., AI Agent uses AI Skills; MCP connects AI Agent to tools; CLI triggers AI Agent; 蒸馏 compresses AI models; OpenClaw orchestrates agents
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white paper texture background, light ruled or dot-grid lines suggesting a notebook page
Lighting/mood: friendly, approachable, educational — warm and clear
Color palette: warm off-white base with accent colors per concept node (soft blue, coral, mint green, yellow, lavender), hand-drawn ink outlines
Materials/textures: paper notebook texture, ink pen strokes, hand-lettered labels, light watercolor fills inside nodes
Text (verbatim): "AI" / "MCP" / "AI Agent" / "OpenClaw" / "AI Skill" / "蒸馏" / "CLI"
Constraints: all 7 concept names must appear as legible text labels; relationship arrows between concepts must be visible and labeled; definitions written in plain accessible language inside each node; image must be self-contained and readable without external context
Avoid: dark or overly technical diagram aesthetic, generic flowchart clip-art style, cluttered overlapping text, neon or harsh colors
